description_long: This object appears to be a stylized representation of a large bird, possibly a crow or raven, with angular, faceted surfaces and a sleek, elongated body. The plumage is rendered in a glossy, almost metallic black, with sharp, geometric wings and tail feathers that give it a modern, abstract appearance. The head is small and pointed, with a subtle beak visible at the front, and the body tapers dramatically toward the tail. The overall form is aerodynamic and streamlined, suggesting a bird in flight or gliding. The surface reflects light in a way that accentuates the sharp edges and planar facets. There are no visible legs or feet, emphasizing the impression of movement or suspension in the air.
description: A sleek, angular black bird with glossy, faceted surfaces and a streamlined, abstract form, resembling a crow or raven in flight.
description_view_0: The front and side of the bird are visible, showing the pointed beak, sharp wing edges, and glossy black surfaces.
description_view_1: A top-down view highlights the elongated, triangular body and the spread of the wings, with subtle blue reflections.
description_view_2: A rear or tail-end view, mostly showing the tapered, angular tail and a hint of the wing's edge.
description_view_3: A close-up of the tail section, emphasizing the sharp, faceted geometry and dark coloration.
